title: Icy Energizing Dutch Rye Bread Flatbread
description: This winey and velvety flatbread is a twist on traditional Dutch rye, featuring a soffritto base and a diabetic-friendly twist. Serve it in a scallop shell for a unique presentation.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the rye flour, yeast, salt, ginger, and black pepper.
Add the olive oil and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle about 1/4 inch thick.
Place the dough in a scallop shell and brush the edges with the egg wash.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until it is golden brown and crispy.
Let the flatbread cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the flatbread warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
